testsuite.name: tests.CoreFeaturesTest

testcase.name: validateBasicInfoFields
testcase.system-out:
✅ Typed 'Gautam Kumar' into Name Input
✅ Typed 'gk@test.com' into Email Input
✅ Typed '9800000000' into Phone Input
✅ Typed 'Tech Park, Bangalore' into Address Input

testcase.name: validateFormSection1
testcase.system-out:
✅ Typed 'Test Data 1' into Section 1
✅ Performed Click on: Section 1 Submit

testcase.name: validateFormSection2
testcase.system-out:
✅ Typed 'Test Data 2' into Section 2
✅ Performed Click on: Section 2 Submit

testcase.name: validateFormSection3
testcase.system-out:
✅ Typed 'Test Data 3' into Section 3
✅ Performed Click on: Section 3 Submit

testcase.name: validateMaleRadioButton
testcase.system-out: ✅ Performed Click on: Male Radio Button

testcase.name: validateSecondaryDatePicker
testcase.system-out: ✅ Entered Date into Date Picker 2 via script injection

testcase.name: validateDateRangePicker
testcase.system-out:
✅ Typed '01/01/2026' into Start Date Picker
✅ Typed '12/31/2026' into End Date Picker
✅ Performed Click on: Date Range Submit

testcase.name: validateSimpleAlert
testcase.system-out:
✅ Performed Click on: Simple Alert
✅ Accepted Simple Alert

testcase.name: validateConfirmationAlert
testcase.system-out:
✅ Performed Click on: Confirm Alert
✅ Accepted Confirm Alert

testcase.name: validatePromptAlert
testcase.system-out:
✅ Performed Click on: Prompt Alert
✅ Injected text and Accepted Prompt Alert

testsuite.system-out:
✅ Typed 'Gautam Kumar' into Name Input
✅ Typed 'gk@test.com' into Email Input
✅ Typed '9800000000' into Phone Input
✅ Typed 'Tech Park, Bangalore' into Address Input
✅ Typed 'Test Data 1' into Section 1
✅ Performed Click on: Section 1 Submit
✅ Typed 'Test Data 2' into Section 2
✅ Performed Click on: Section 2 Submit
✅ Typed 'Test Data 3' into Section 3
✅ Performed Click on: Section 3 Submit
✅ Performed Click on: Male Radio Button
✅ Performed Click on: Sunday Checkbox
✅ Selected 'India' from Country Dropdown
✅ Selected 'Blue' from Colors Dropdown
✅ Selected 'Elephant' from Sorted List Dropdown
✅ Typed '12/31/2026' into Date Picker 1
✅ Entered Date into Date Picker 2 via script injection
✅ Typed '01/01/2026' into Start Date Picker
✅ Typed '12/31/2026' into End Date Picker
✅ Performed Click on: Date Range Submit
✅ Uploaded single file
✅ Uploaded multiple files
✅ Performed Click on: Simple Alert
✅ Accepted Simple Alert
✅ Performed Click on: Confirm Alert
✅ Accepted Confirm Alert
✅ Performed Click on: Prompt Alert
✅ Injected text and Accepted Prompt Alert
✅ Typed 'Selenium' into Wikipedia Search Box
✅ Performed Click on: Wikipedia Search Button
✅ Performed Click on: Dynamic START Button
✅ Performed Click on: Scrolling Dropdown Box
✅ Injected Item 8 value directly into scrolling combobox input
✅ Performed Click on: Page 4 Pagination
✅ Performed Click on: Mouse Checkbox in Table
✅ IFrame element verified safely
